title: Lake Nakuru & Maasai Mara Safari
description: A 4-day safari covering Lake Nakuru National Park and Maasai Mara Game Reserve. Experience diverse wildlife, scenic landscapes, and comfortable lodge and camp stays with full board accommodation and guided game drives.
highlights: Lake Nakuru National Park wildlife experience
Stay at Lake Nakuru Sopa Lodge
Stay at Olkurruk/Olkoroi Camp in Maasai Mara
Unlimited game drives with professional guide

itinerary.title: Transfer to Lake Nakuru
itinerary.description: Travel to Lake Nakuru National Park and check in at Lake Nakuru Sopa Lodge. Enjoy game drives in the park.

itinerary.title: Lake Nakuru to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Depart Lake Nakuru and travel to Maasai Mara. Check in at camp and enjoy an evening game drive.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara Safari
itinerary.description: Full day of game drives in Maasai Mara with opportunities to spot diverse wildlife.

included: Transport in a safari equipped landcruiser
Park entrance fees and applicable taxes
accommodation: Lake Nakuru Sopa Lodge – Lake Nakuru (1 night)

travelInfo.clothes: Bring mosquito repellent, sunscreen, a hat and sunglasses. Early mornings and evenings in the Maasai Mara can be cool so a light jacket or sweater is recommended.
travelInfo.food: Meals are served at luxury camps and lodges offering international cuisine.

note: Cost is based on 4 people traveling together.
